auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Paymo API key used as the Basic Auth username. Generate it from Paymo My Account: https://app.paymoapp.com/#Paymo.module.myaccount/

actions.name: create_client
actions.description: Create one Paymo client from a JSON client payload.

data.description: The Paymo client fields to create or update, such as name, email, phone, website, or address fields.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating one Paymo client.

client.description: A raw Paymo resource object returned by the API.

actions.name: create_project
actions.description: Create one Paymo project from a JSON project payload.

data.description: The Paymo project fields to create or update, such as name, client_id, description, or workflow_id.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating one Paymo project.

project.description: A raw Paymo resource object returned by the API.

actions.name: create_task
actions.description: Create one Paymo task from a JSON task payload.

data.description: The Paymo task fields to create or update, such as name, description, project_id, tasklist_id, users, complete, due_date, status_id, or priority.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating one Paymo task.

task.description: A raw Paymo resource object returned by the API.

actions.name: delete_client
actions.description: Delete one Paymo client by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting one Paymo client.

deleted.description: Whether the Paymo resource deletion request completed successfully.

actions.name: delete_project
actions.description: Delete one Paymo project by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting one Paymo project.

deleted.description: Whether the Paymo resource deletion request completed successfully.

actions.name: delete_task
actions.description: Delete one Paymo task by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting one Paymo task.

deleted.description: Whether the Paymo resource deletion request completed successfully.

actions.name: get_client
actions.description: Get one Paymo client by ID.

include.description: The Paymo include expression for adding related content to the response.

partial_include.description: The Paymo partial_include expression for adding lightweight related content.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading one Paymo resource.

client.description: A raw Paymo resource object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the Paymo user associated with the current API key.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require input.

user.description: A raw Paymo resource object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Get one Paymo project by ID.

include.description: The Paymo include expression for adding related content to the response.

partial_include.description: The Paymo partial_include expression for adding lightweight related content.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading one Paymo resource.

project.description: A raw Paymo resource object returned by the API.

actions.name: get_task
actions.description: Get one Paymo task by ID.

include.description: The Paymo include expression for adding related content to the response.

partial_include.description: The Paymo partial_include expression for adding lightweight related content.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading one Paymo resource.

task.description: A raw Paymo resource object returned by the API.

actions.name: list_clients
actions.description: List Paymo clients with optional where and include query parameters.

where.description: The Paymo where filter expression to forward to the listing endpoint.

include.description: The Paymo include expression for adding related content to the response.

partial_include.description: The Paymo partial_include expression for adding lightweight related content.

items.description: A raw Paymo resource object returned by the API.

clients.description: The Paymo clients returned for this request.

actions.name: list_projects
actions.description: List Paymo projects with optional where and include query parameters.

where.description: The Paymo where filter expression to forward to the listing endpoint.

include.description: The Paymo include expression for adding related content to the response.

partial_include.description: The Paymo partial_include expression for adding lightweight related content.

items.description: A raw Paymo resource object returned by the API.

projects.description: The Paymo projects returned for this request.

actions.name: list_tasks
actions.description: List Paymo tasks with optional where and include query parameters.

where.description: The Paymo where filter expression to forward to the listing endpoint.

include.description: The Paymo include expression for adding related content to the response.

partial_include.description: The Paymo partial_include expression for adding lightweight related content.

items.description: A raw Paymo resource object returned by the API.

tasks.description: The Paymo tasks returned for this request.
